name: TF141 - Pick Me Girl
description:
Task Force 141 - PICK ME?!

Hiii! I got really tired of TF141 bots take a hint and not talk for my persona so I made my own with specific instructions for it not to. It helped a lot🥹

ALSO ! I tried to make it more canon related and added Farah and Laswell so your persona can have fellow female friends. YES it is interpreted that your persona is female but it can be very easy to change as the (She/Her) pronouns aren't used often in the first message to address {{user}} as I made it include your persona's in the scenario but also let you create what you're doing on your own!
creator: GoofiestGoober_IdioticWeirdo
